steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The notes explicitly state: “She is best known for a 2011 YouTube video that has been viewed over two million times.” This sentence directly identifies Wu's most well-known achievement.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C uses the exact language “is best known for” and includes all the key details — the year (2011), the platform (YouTube video), the work title (Three Beats for Beatbox Flute), and the view count (over two million times).

Choices A and B focus on competitions and education; choice D shifts to the composer.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
